mapper.sql: id, compCode, compName, compAbbr, adminID, compGrade, lawyer, address, regAddress, tel, fax, postCode, webSite, state, effectiveFrom, effectiveTo, disabledTime, remark, createBy, createTime, updateBy, updateTime
mapper.insert:
SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID()
insert into t_company (compCode, compName, compAbbr, adminID, compGrade, lawyer, address, regAddress, tel, fax, postCode, webSite, state, effectiveFrom, effectiveTo, disabledTime, remark, createBy, createTime, updateBy, updateTime ) values (#{compCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{compName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{compAbbr,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{adminID,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{compGrade,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{lawyer,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{address,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{regAddress,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{tel,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{fax,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{postCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{webSite,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{state,jdbcType=BIT}, #{effectiveFrom,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{effectiveTo,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{disabledTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} )

SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID()
insert into t_company
compCode,
compName,
compAbbr,
adminID,
compGrade,
lawyer,
address,
regAddress,
tel,
fax,
postCode,

mapper.update:
update t_company
compCode = #{compCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
compName = #{compName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
compAbbr = #{compAbbr,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
adminID = #{adminID,jdbcType=INTEGER},
compGrade = #{compGrade,jdbcType=INTEGER},
lawyer = #{lawyer,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
address = #{address,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
regAddress = #{regAddress,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
tel = #{tel,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
fax = #{fax,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
postCode = #{postCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
webSite = #{webSite,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
state = #{state,jdbcType=BIT},
effectiveFrom = #{effectiveFrom,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
effectiveTo = #{effectiveTo,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
disabledTime = #{disabledTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
remark = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
createBy = #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
createTime = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
updateBy = #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
updateTime = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update t_company set compCode = #{compCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, compName = #{compName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, compAbbr = #{compAbbr,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, adminID = #{adminID,jdbcType=INTEGER}, compGrade = #{compGrade,jdbcType=INTEGER}, lawyer = #{lawyer,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, address = #{address,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, regAddress = #{regAddress,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, tel = #{tel,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, fax = #{fax,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, postCode = #{postCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, webSite = #{webSite,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, state = #{state,jdbcType=BIT}, effectiveFrom = #{effectiveFrom,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, effectiveTo = #{effectiveTo,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, disabledTime = #{disabledTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, remark = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, createBy = #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, createTime = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, updateBy = #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, updateTime = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}
mapper.select:
select * from t_company
id = #{id, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
compCode = #{compCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
compName = #{compName, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
compAbbr = #{compAbbr, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
adminID = #{adminID, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
compGrade = #{compGrade, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
lawyer = #{lawyer, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
address = #{address, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
regAddress = #{regAddress, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
tel = #{tel, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
fax = #{fax, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
postCode = #{postCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
webSite = #{webSite, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
state = #{state, jdbcType=BIT} AND
effectiveFrom = #{effectiveFrom, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
effectiveTo = #{effectiveTo, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
disabledTime = #{disabledTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
remark = #{remark, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
createBy = #{createBy, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
createTime = #{createTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
updateBy = #{updateBy, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
updateTime = #{updateTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND

select count(1) from t_company
id = #{id, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
compCode = #{compCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
compName = #{compName, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND

webSite = #{webSite, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
state = #{state, jdbcType=BIT} AND
effectiveFrom = #{effectiveFrom, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
effectiveTo = #{effectiveTo, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND

updateBy = #{updateBy, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND

select * from t_company
id = #{model.id, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
compCode = #{model.compCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
compName = #{model.compName, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
compAbbr = #{model.compAbbr, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
adminID = #{model.adminID, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
compGrade = #{model.compGrade, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
lawyer = #{model.lawyer, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
address = #{model.address, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
regAddress = #{model.regAddress, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
tel = #{model.tel, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
fax = #{model.fax, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
postCode = #{model.postCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
webSite = #{model.webSite, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
state = #{model.state, jdbcType=BIT} AND
effectiveFrom = #{model.effectiveFrom, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
effectiveTo = #{model.effectiveTo, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
disabledTime = #{model.disabledTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
remark = #{model.remark, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
createBy = #{model.createBy, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
createTime = #{model.createTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
updateBy = #{model.updateBy, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
updateTime = #{model.updateTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
( compCode like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or compName like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or compAbbr like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or lawyer like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or address like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or regAddress like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or tel like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or fax like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or postCode like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or webSite like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or remark like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or createBy like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or updateBy like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") )
order by ${orderBy}
order by id desc
limit #{start}, #{pageSize}

select count(1) from t_company
id = #{model.id, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
compCode = #{model.compCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
compName = #{model.compName, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
compAbbr = #{model.compAbbr, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
adminID = #{model.adminID, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
compGrade = #{model.compGrade, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
lawyer = #{model.lawyer, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
address = #{model.address, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
regAddress = #{model.regAddress, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
tel = #{model.tel, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
fax = #{model.fax, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
postCode = #{model.postCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
webSite = #{model.webSite, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
state = #{model.state, jdbcType=BIT} AND
effectiveFrom = #{model.effectiveFrom, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
effectiveTo = #{model.effectiveTo, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
disabledTime = #{model.disabledTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
remark = #{model.remark, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
createBy = #{model.createBy, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
createTime = #{model.createTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
updateBy = #{model.updateBy, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
updateTime = #{model.updateTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
( compCode like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or compName like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or compAbbr like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or lawyer like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or address like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or regAddress like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or tel like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or fax like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or postCode like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or webSite like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or remark like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or createBy like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or updateBy like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") )
SELECT CASE WHEN adminID = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS parent FROM t_company WHERE id = #{compId}
